briefs.title: Developers Who Started Instalment Payments Before 2026 Keep Their Old Payment Rules
briefs.summary: BC updated its Development Cost Charge rules so that developers who chose to pay their transit development fees in instalments and made their first payment before January 1, 2026, will continue under the old payment terms — not the new ones.
briefs.action_required: If you paid the first instalment of a TransLink development cost charge before Jan 1, 2026, confirm with your lawyer that the old payment terms still apply to your project.

key_dates.label: BC Development Cost Charge amended payment rules take effect
